series_metadata.series_description: These files contain unused evidence from administrative investigations, hearings, orders, judicial appeals, and judicial actions (including discovery, correspondence, and other materials created in connection with such appeals and actions).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: enforcement documents which were not used as evidence in an administrative enforcement case, litigation, or judicial appeals/action, in operating area one (1) year enforcement case is resolved or closed ; Electronic: electronically maintained enforcement files, which were not used as evidence in case administrative enforcement case, litigation, or judicial appeals/action, in operating area one (1) year enforcement case is resolved or closed
